tests.name: count_answer: count exceeds value → invalid
count_answer: count + remaining < value → invalid
count_answer: exact count, no remaining → valid
count_answer: count < value, remaining could match → pending
count_answer: count equals value but remaining > 0 → pending
count_answer: count matches, remaining eliminated → valid
count_answer: null value → invalid (count can never be null)
count_answer_before: count in range exceeds value → invalid
count_answer_before: exact count in range → valid
count_answer_after: count + remaining < value → invalid
count_answer_after: exact count → valid
count_vowel: count exceeds value → invalid
count_vowel: exact count → valid
count_vowel: unanswered could be vowels → pending
count_consonant: count + remaining < value → invalid
count_consonant: exact count → valid
answer_of: target has different answer → invalid
answer_of: target matches → valid
answer_of: target not answered → pending
answer_of: target's claimed letter struck out → invalid
letter_distance: distance doesn't match → invalid
letter_distance: distance matches → valid
letter_distance: other not answered → pending
same_answer_as: target has different answer → invalid
same_answer_as: target has same answer → valid
same_answer_as: target not answered → pending
same_answer_as: target's letter struck out → invalid
unique_answer: duplicate exists → invalid
unique_answer: all answered, no duplicate → valid
unique_answer: no duplicate yet, unanswered could match → pending
unique_answer: unanswered but answer eliminated → valid
first_with: claimed position has wrong answer → invalid
first_with: earlier question has the answer → invalid
first_with: claims None but A exists → invalid
first_with: correct first, all earlier answered → valid
first_with: claims None, no A exists → valid
first_with: position has A but earlier unanswered → pending
first_with: claimed position unanswered → pending
first_with: earlier unanswered has A eliminated → valid
consec_ident: Q1=C but C eliminated from Q2 → invalid
first_with: claimed position has answer eliminated → invalid
last_with: later question has the answer → invalid
last_with: correct last, all later answered → valid
last_with: correct position but later unanswered → pending
closest_after: correct closest → valid
closest_after: earlier match in range → invalid
closest_before: correct closest → valid
closest_before: later match in range → invalid
prev_same: target >= self → invalid
prev_same: target has different answer → invalid
prev_same: closer match exists → invalid
prev_same: claims None but match exists → invalid
prev_same: correct target, no closer → valid
prev_same: claims None, no match → valid
prev_same: target ok but closer unanswered → pending
next_same: target <= self → invalid
next_same: correct next, no closer → valid
next_same: target unanswered → pending
only_same: target has different answer → invalid
only_same: non-target also has same answer → invalid
only_same: exactly one match at target → valid
only_same: target matches but others unanswered → pending
only_same: target's letter struck out → invalid
consec_ident: claimed pair has different answers → invalid
consec_ident: claims None but pair exists → invalid
consec_ident: one matching pair, all others different → valid
consec_ident: claims None, all answered differently → valid
consec_ident: pair matches but others uncertain → pending
only_odd: claimed position is even (1-indexed) → invalid
only_odd: claimed position has wrong answer → invalid
only_odd: another odd position has the answer → invalid
only_odd: only one odd position has A → valid
only_odd: correct position but other odd unanswered → pending
only_odd: target's letter struck out → invalid
only_odd: claims None but odd position has A → invalid
only_even: claimed position is odd (1-indexed) → invalid
only_even: claimed position has wrong answer → invalid
only_even: another even position has the answer → invalid
only_even: only one even position has A → valid
only_even: correct position but other even unanswered → pending
only_even: target's letter struck out → invalid
only_even: claims None but even position has A → invalid
only_true_stmt: selected claim true, depends on own answer → consistent
only_true_stmt: selected claim is false → invalid
only_true_stmt: not all answered → pending
only_true_stmt: selected claim provably false with partial state → invalid
only_true_stmt: selected claim provably true, all others invalid → consistent
only_true_stmt: claim doesn't depend on own answer → valid (proven)
only_true_stmt: all options eliminated → invalid
answer_is_self: always valid
most_common_count: letter already exceeds value → invalid
most_common_count: all answered, max matches → valid
most_common_count: unanswered → pending
least_common: all answered, unique least → valid
least_common: all answered, wrong → invalid
least_common: not all answered → pending
most_common: all answered, correct → valid
most_common: all answered, wrong → invalid
equal_count: option is reference answer → invalid
equal_count: all answered, counts equal → valid
equal_count: all answered, counts differ → invalid
equal_count: count ranges can't overlap → invalid
equal_count: not all answered → pending
equal_count: None correct, no other letter matches → valid
equal_count: None wrong, another letter matches → invalid
equal_count: None, not all answered → pending
same_answer_which: correct match → valid
same_answer_which: option target mismatch → invalid
same_answer_which: ref not answered → pending
same_answer_which: target's letter struck out → invalid
unanswered question → neutral
